proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `npm1_mutation` = 1 have a higher `objective_response` rate than patients with `npm1_mutation` = 0.

analyses.code: Two-proportion z-test comparing objective_response by npm1_mutation.
analyses.result_summary: `objective_response` was 0.2346 for `npm1_mutation` = 1 (n=15014) versus 0.1673 for `npm1_mutation` = 0 (n=34986), risk difference +0.0674.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with poor performance status (`ecog_ps` >= 2) have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients with `ecog_ps` < 2.

analyses.code: Two-proportion z-test comparing objective_response for ecog_ps >= 2 versus < 2.
analyses.result_summary: `objective_response` was 0.1291 for `ecog_ps` >= 2 (n=7437) versus 0.1977 for `ecog_ps` < 2 (n=42563), risk difference -0.0686.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with high leukemic burden (`wbc_k_per_ul` >= 50) have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients with `wbc_k_per_ul` < 50.
Patients with high marrow blast burden (`blast_pct_marrow` >= 70) have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients with `blast_pct_marrow` < 70.

analyses.code: Two-proportion z-test for wbc_k_per_ul >= 50.
analyses.result_summary: `objective_response` was 0.1670 for `wbc_k_per_ul` >= 50 (n=3982) versus 0.1893 below 50, risk difference -0.0223.

analyses.code: Two-proportion z-test for blast_pct_marrow >= 70.
analyses.result_summary: `objective_response` was 0.1681 for `blast_pct_marrow` >= 70 (n=15315) versus 0.1961 below 70, risk difference -0.0279.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with low albumin (`albumin_g_dl` < 3.5) have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients with `albumin_g_dl` >= 3.5.
Patients with clinically meaningful weight loss (`weight_loss_pct_6mo` >= 10) have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients with less weight loss.
Patients with elevated inflammation (`crp_mg_l` >= 10) have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients with `crp_mg_l` < 10.

analyses.code: Two-proportion z-test for albumin_g_dl < 3.5.
analyses.result_summary: `objective_response` was 0.1736 for `albumin_g_dl` < 3.5 versus 0.1920 otherwise, risk difference -0.0184.

analyses.code: Two-proportion z-test for weight_loss_pct_6mo >= 10.
analyses.result_summary: `objective_response` was 0.1399 for `weight_loss_pct_6mo` >= 10 versus 0.1917 below 10, risk difference -0.0518.

analyses.code: Two-proportion z-test for crp_mg_l >= 10.
analyses.result_summary: `objective_response` was 0.1641 for `crp_mg_l` >= 10 versus 0.1920 below 10, risk difference -0.0278.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with adverse genetics (`tp53_mutation` = 1) have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients with `tp53_mutation` = 0.
Patients with `complex_karyotype` = 1 have a lower `objective_response` rate than patients with `complex_karyotype` = 0.

analyses.code: Two-proportion z-test comparing objective_response by tp53_mutation.
analyses.result_summary: `objective_response` was 0.1657 for `tp53_mutation` = 1 versus 0.1899 for `tp53_mutation` = 0, risk difference -0.0242.

analyses.code: Two-proportion z-test comparing objective_response by complex_karyotype.
analyses.result_summary: `objective_response` was 0.1681 for `complex_karyotype` = 1 versus 0.1909 for `complex_karyotype` = 0, risk difference -0.0229.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `unfit_for_intensive` = 1 have a higher `objective_response` rate than patients with `unfit_for_intensive` = 0, potentially reflecting therapy selection.
Patients receiving `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` = 1 have a higher `objective_response` rate than patients not receiving it.

analyses.code: Two-proportion z-test comparing objective_response by unfit_for_intensive.
analyses.result_summary: `objective_response` was 0.2210 for `unfit_for_intensive` = 1 versus 0.1651 for `unfit_for_intensive` = 0, risk difference +0.0559.

analyses.code: Two-proportion z-test comparing objective_response by treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine.
analyses.result_summary: `objective_response` was 0.2196 with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` = 1 versus 0.1661 without it, risk difference +0.0535.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After multivariable adjustment, `npm1_mutation` = 1 remains associated with a higher probability of `objective_response`.
After multivariable adjustment, each one-point increase in `ecog_ps` remains associated with a lower probability of `objective_response`.

analyses.code: Robust linear probability model adjusted for demographics, AML features, continuous disease burden, inflammatory markers, and treatments.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for `npm1_mutation` was +0.0675 on the response-probability scale.

analyses.code: Same adjusted robust linear probability model.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for each one-point higher `ecog_ps` was -0.0522 on the response-probability scale.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The response advantage of `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` is larger in patients with `unfit_for_intensive` = 1 than in patients with `unfit_for_intensive` = 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted robust linear probability model with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` * `unfit_for_intensive` interaction.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted interaction coefficient for `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`:`unfit_for_intensive` was +0.1522.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within patients with `unfit_for_intensive` = 1, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` = 1 is associated with a higher `objective_response` rate than no venetoclax/azacitidine.

analyses.code: Stratified risk-difference comparison among unfit_for_intensive = 1.
analyses.result_summary: Among `unfit_for_intensive` = 1 patients, `objective_response` was 0.3081 with venetoclax/azacitidine versus 0.1630 without it, risk difference +0.1451.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Within patients with `unfit_for_intensive` = 0, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` = 1 does not show the same positive `objective_response` association and may be slightly lower than no venetoclax/azacitidine.

analyses.code: Stratified risk-difference comparison among unfit_for_intensive = 0.
analyses.result_summary: Among `unfit_for_intensive` = 0 patients, `objective_response` was 0.1605 with venetoclax/azacitidine versus 0.1681 without it, risk difference -0.0077; the adjusted interaction in iteration 8 confirmed heterogeneity.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The response advantage of `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` is larger in patients with `npm1_mutation` = 1 than in patients with `npm1_mutation` = 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted robust linear probability model with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` * `npm1_mutation` interaction.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted interaction coefficient for `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`:`npm1_mutation` was +0.1912.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients receiving `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` = 1, `npm1_mutation` = 1 is associated with a higher `objective_response` rate than `npm1_mutation` = 0.

analyses.code: Stratified two-proportion z-test among treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine = 1.
analyses.result_summary: Among venetoclax/azacitidine-treated patients, `objective_response` was 0.3466 for `npm1_mutation` = 1 versus 0.1649 for `npm1_mutation` = 0, risk difference +0.1816.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The response advantage of `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` is smaller in patients with `tp53_mutation` = 1 than in patients with `tp53_mutation` = 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted robust linear probability model with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` * `tp53_mutation` interaction.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted interaction coefficient for `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`:`tp53_mutation` was -0.0684.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients receiving `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` = 1, `tp53_mutation` = 1 is associated with a lower `objective_response` rate than `tp53_mutation` = 0.

analyses.code: Stratified two-proportion z-test among treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine = 1.
analyses.result_summary: Among venetoclax/azacitidine-treated patients, `objective_response` was 0.1636 for `tp53_mutation` = 1 versus 0.2260 for `tp53_mutation` = 0, risk difference -0.0624.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` association is especially large in patients jointly characterized by `unfit_for_intensive` = 1 and `npm1_mutation` = 1.

analyses.code: Adjusted robust linear probability model including two-way interactions and the `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`:`unfit_for_intensive`:`npm1_mutation` term.
analyses.result_summary: The three-way interaction coefficient for venetoclax/azacitidine, unfit status, and NPM1 mutation was +0.4640.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The joint presence of `tp53_mutation` = 1 attenuates the `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` association in the `unfit_for_intensive` = 1 subgroup.

analyses.code: Adjusted robust linear probability model including two-way interactions and the `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`:`unfit_for_intensive`:`tp53_mutation` term.
analyses.result_summary: The three-way interaction coefficient for venetoclax/azacitidine, unfit status, and TP53 mutation was -0.1586.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In the high-response subgroup `unfit_for_intensive` = 1, `npm1_mutation` = 1, and `tp53_mutation` = 0, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` = 1 is associated with a much higher `objective_response` rate than no venetoclax/azacitidine.

analyses.code: Stratified risk-difference comparison within unfit_for_intensive = 1, npm1_mutation = 1, tp53_mutation = 0.
analyses.result_summary: In this subgroup, `objective_response` was 0.6908 with venetoclax/azacitidine (n=2125) versus 0.1569 without it (n=3224), risk difference +0.5339.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In patients with `flt3_itd` = 1, `treatment_midostaurin` = 1 is associated with a higher `objective_response` rate than no midostaurin.
In patients with `flt3_itd` = 1, `treatment_gilteritinib` = 1 is associated with a higher `objective_response` rate than no gilteritinib.

analyses.code: Adjusted robust linear probability model with `treatment_midostaurin` * `flt3_itd` interaction.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted interaction coefficient for `treatment_midostaurin`:`flt3_itd` was -0.0153; FLT3-ITD patients treated with midostaurin had response 0.1764 versus 0.1914 without it in the unadjusted stratum.

analyses.code: Adjusted robust linear probability model with `treatment_gilteritinib` * `flt3_itd` interaction.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted interaction coefficient for `treatment_gilteritinib`:`flt3_itd` was +0.0104; this was not statistically significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In patients with `idh1_mutation` = 1, `treatment_ivosidenib` = 1 is associated with a higher `objective_response` rate than no ivosidenib.
In patients with `idh2_mutation` = 1, `treatment_enasidenib` = 1 is associated with a higher `objective_response` rate than no enasidenib.

analyses.code: Adjusted robust linear probability model with `treatment_ivosidenib` * `idh1_mutation` interaction.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted interaction coefficient for `treatment_ivosidenib`:`idh1_mutation` was -0.0439, borderline in the opposite direction from the hypothesis.

analyses.code: Adjusted robust linear probability model with `treatment_enasidenib` * `idh2_mutation` interaction.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted interaction coefficient for `treatment_enasidenib`:`idh2_mutation` was +0.0037 and not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association of intensive chemotherapy (`treatment_7plus3` = 1) with `objective_response` is lower in patients with `unfit_for_intensive` = 1 than in patients with `unfit_for_intensive` = 0.
The association of intensive chemotherapy (`treatment_7plus3` = 1) with `objective_response` is lower in patients age 75 or older than in younger patients.

analyses.code: Adjusted robust linear probability model with `treatment_7plus3` * `unfit_for_intensive` interaction.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted interaction coefficient for `treatment_7plus3`:`unfit_for_intensive` was -0.0019 and not significant.

analyses.code: Adjusted robust linear probability model with `treatment_7plus3` * age >= 75 interaction.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted interaction coefficient for `treatment_7plus3`:age >= 75 was +0.0077 and not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The favorable association of `npm1_mutation` = 1 with `objective_response` is weaker in patients who also have `flt3_itd` = 1.

analyses.code: Adjusted robust linear probability model with `flt3_itd` * `npm1_mutation` interaction.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted interaction coefficient for `flt3_itd`:`npm1_mutation` was -0.0049 and not significant, so FLT3-ITD did not materially attenuate the NPM1 association.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The negative association of `tp53_mutation` = 1 with `objective_response` is stronger in patients who also have `complex_karyotype` = 1.

analyses.code: Adjusted robust linear probability model with `complex_karyotype` * `tp53_mutation` interaction.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted interaction coefficient for `complex_karyotype`:`tp53_mutation` was +0.0177 and not significant, suggesting no extra negative synergy beyond the adverse main effects.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Older age (`age_years` >= 75) is associated with a lower `objective_response` rate than age below 75.
Female sex (`sex_female` = 1) is associated with a higher `objective_response` rate than `sex_female` = 0.

analyses.code: Two-proportion z-test for age_years >= 75.
analyses.result_summary: `objective_response` was 0.1870 for age >= 75 versus 0.1877 for age < 75, risk difference -0.0007.

analyses.code: Two-proportion z-test comparing objective_response by sex_female.
analyses.result_summary: `objective_response` was 0.1891 for `sex_female` = 1 versus 0.1862 for `sex_female` = 0, risk difference +0.0029.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `secondary_aml` = 1 is associated with a lower adjusted probability of `objective_response` than `secondary_aml` = 0.
`atrial_fibrillation` = 1 is associated with a lower adjusted probability of `objective_response` than `atrial_fibrillation` = 0.

analyses.code: Adjusted robust linear probability model including `secondary_aml` and core AML/treatment covariates.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted coefficient for `secondary_aml` was +0.0004, not lower and not significant.

analyses.code: Adjusted robust linear probability model adding `atrial_fibrillation` to the core AML/treatment covariates.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted coefficient for `atrial_fibrillation` was -0.0114, but it did not reach p < 0.05.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `liver_mets` = 1 have a slightly higher `objective_response` rate, and patients with `her2_amplification` = 1 have a slightly lower `objective_response` rate, than patients without those features; these exploratory non-AML fields are expected to have small effects.
After adjustment, inflammation and nutritional status retain independent associations with `objective_response`: higher `crp_mg_l` is lower response and higher `albumin_g_dl` is higher response.

analyses.code: Two-proportion z-tests for liver_mets and her2_amplification.
analyses.result_summary: `liver_mets` had risk difference +0.0063 (p=0.199) and `her2_amplification` had risk difference -0.0064 (p=0.538), supporting no meaningful AML response signal.

analyses.code: Adjusted robust linear probability model with standardized log1p_crp_mg_l and standardized albumin_g_dl.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficients were -0.0091 per SD higher log1p(`crp_mg_l`) and +0.0091 per SD higher `albumin_g_dl`; both were significant.
